title: Desert Morning Mug
description: Handthrown ceramic mug with desert-inspired glaze, perfect for morning coffee on the porch.

images.alt: Big Bend dawn colors that inform the Desert Morning Mug glaze

story: Each mug is thrown on the wheel in Susan's studio and glazed in colors pulled from the Big Bend landscape - sunrise orange, sage green, and desert tan.
leadTimeNote: Ships within 1-2 weeks. Packed with extra care.
